prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **3.0L EA897 EVO2 (CZSE) V6 TFSI** with upgraded turbocharger compressor wheel (Garrett GT2260SZ with billet 58mm inducer) and high-flow fuel injectors (Bosch 0261500415, 1,200cc/min), targeting 520hp/650Nm with 93 octane fuel and supporting 2.0 bar peak boost pressure

034 Motorsport billet aluminum intercooler upgrade (part #034-100011-IC) with 4.5" thick core and integrated water-meth injection bungs (Snow Performance Stage 3 kit with dual 550cc/min nozzles) for consistent intake temps under sustained 3,500+ RPM pulls

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (part #35241001) with 8-position rebound damping, 20-way compression adjustment, and 40mm front/35mm rear ride height reduction, paired with H&R 28mm front/25mm rear anti-roll bars (part #54660) and polyurethane subframe bushings (034 Motorsport #034-04-1000)
estetica: Rieger Tuning Touareg R-specific widebody kit (part #RT-VW-TOU-001) with carbon fiber front fenders (25mm wider per side), rear quarter panels (30mm wider), and integrated side skirts, finished in Satin Graphite Metallic (VW L0Q8) with exposed carbon weave accents

Vorsteiner V-FF107 forged 22x10.5" ET25 (front) and 22x11.5" ET30 (rear) wheels in Gloss Black with brushed lip, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30R22 front, 305/25R22 rear) and paired with Brembo GT 6-piston 400mm front/4-piston 380mm rear big brake kit (part #1B0615125G)

Maxton Design Type-4R rear diffuser (part #MAXTON-VW-TOU-004) with integrated quad 100mm titanium exhaust tips (Akrapović Evolution Line, part #S-VW-TOU19) and custom carbon fiber engine cover (034 Motorsport #034-10-1001) featuring laser-etched "EA897 EVO2" script
